source_jobs.title: Accountant – Accounts Payables
source_jobs.description:
JOB PURPOSE
 
Assist in conducting A/P accounting and system update activities for corporate, asset management and other payables
 
 
ROLES AND RESPONSIBILITIES
 
Assist in performing accurate A/P accounting and correct coding of vendor, cost center, general ledger account, invoice amount
 
Assist in vendor analysis, expense review and analysis
 
Ensure that all invoices are approved according to the DOA
 
Create A/P vouchers and send to the relevant Department for approval
 
Assist in issuing cheques and transfer letters
 
Coordinate with other departments to determine the required accruals before the closing of the accounting period.
 
Assist in preparation of reports on the status of payables, reconciliation statement of account payable, supplier's statement / ledger and accruals accounts
 
Allocate costs to each activity ensuring accurate accounting of payables.
 
 
RELATED YEAR OF EXPERIENCE
 
Min of 4+ years of experience of financial accounting and management accounting experience
 
 
 
FIELD OF EXPERIENCE
 
Experience of accounting within real estate or related industry is preferred
 
Experience in A/P
 
 
TECHNICAL AND INTERPERSONAL SKILLS
 
Knowledge of and ability to apply international accounting standards and ERP systems
 
Knowledge of and ability to adhere to internal controls
 
Good analytical skills
 
Vigilant and detail oriented
 
Strong communication skills
 
Strong time management capabilities
 
 
QUALIFICATION
 
Bachelor’s degree in Accounting

source_jobs.title: Assistant Vice President - Building Information Modelling (BIM)
source_jobs.description:
JOB PURPOSE
Lead the integration and implementation of BIM technologies across all projects, ensuring seamless coordination and high-quality execution. 
Drive the adoption of BIM standards and workflows, ensuring projects are delivered efficiently, on schedule, and in compliance with Aldar’s vision of innovation and excellence in the real estate and infrastructure sectors.
ROLES AND RESPONSIBILITIES
Develop and maintain BIM standards, protocols, and guidelines to ensure consistency and quality in BIM models and project workflows.
Collaborate with internal Design team to integrate BIM into design, construction, and project management processes.
Oversee the creation, coordination, and management of 3D BIM models and related data throughout all phases of the project lifecycle.
Provide technical leadership in the use of BIM software (e.g., Revit, Navisworks, BIM 360) and ensure that the team is trained and proficient in these tools.
Monitor and support the team in the implementation of BIM processes, including 3D modeling, clash detection, and virtual design reviews.
Lead BIM coordination meetings and collaborate with multidisciplinary teams to resolve any design conflicts or issues.
Ensure that BIM deliverables are aligned with project goals, schedules, budgets, and quality standards.
Stay up-to-date with the latest trends and advancements in BIM technology and methodologies and apply them to improve project performance.
Promote continuous improvement in BIM practices and workflows through training, mentorship, and process optimization.
Work closely with senior management to provide input on BIM strategies, project plans, and technological advancements.
Ensure proper documentation and maintenance of BIM models, drawings, and reports throughout the project lifecycle.
Manage the integration of BIM with other project management tools and platforms for seamless collaboration and data sharing.
FIELD OF EXPERIENCE
Deep exposure to GCC region and adjacent markets preferred
Demonstrated track record in Civil/Structural design for real estate industry
TECHNICAL AND INTERPERSONAL SKILLS
Strong knowledge of MEP design principles, systems, and technologies (HVAC, lighting, power, water, fire protection, etc.).
Proficient in MEP design software (e.g., AutoCAD MEP, Revit MEP, HVAC design software, electrical load calculation software, etc.).
Experience in managing and leading multidisciplinary teams in a design and project delivery environment.
Thorough understanding of local and international codes, regulations, and standards related to MEP systems.
Excellent problem-solving, communication, and interpersonal skills.
Ability to manage multiple projects and meet tight deadlines.
Strong project management skills, with experience in budget, schedule, and scope management.
Ability to liaise effectively with clients, contractors, and other stakeholders. 
QUALIFICATION
Bachelor’s degree in Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering and related field.
Master’s Degree preferred.

source_jobs.title: Assistant Vice President - Development Marketing
source_jobs.description:
Job Purpose 
 
Lead and execute comprehensive marketing strategies for Aldar Development's real estate projects, managing campaigns from ideation through launch. Ensure effective positioning and promotion of properties to drive sales and brand awareness across all channels.
 
Roles & Responsibilities 
 
Strategic Leadership:
 
• Develop and execute comprehensive marketing strategies for real estate projects
• Lead brand and content strategy, ensuring consistency across all marketing initiatives
 
Campaign Development:
 
• Oversee end-to-end marketing campaigns for new and existing product launches
• Lead and execute Aldar’s brand and content strategy in partnership with the Head of Department, ensuring consistency and alignment across all marketing initiatives.
• Manage project budgets, timelines, and resources effectively
 
Cross-functional Collaboration:
 
• Coordinate with Development, Sales, and Construction Management teams
• Collaborate with internal stakeholders on various matters related to real estate development
 
Market Research and Analytics:
 
• Conduct market research to identify marketing opportunities
• Utilize advanced analytics to inform marketing strategies and optimize performance
 
Content Creation and Management:
 
• Supervise the creation of marketing materials, including digital content, presentations, and literature
• Oversee website and social media content management
 
Event Management:
 
• Oversee the planning and execute promotional events and digital campaigns
• Represent the company at key industry events
 
Stakeholder Management:
 
• Deliver high-impact presentations to various audiences
• Manage relationships with external partners and contractors
 
Team Leadership:
 
• Provide strategic guidance to marketing associates
• Oversee daily administrative functions of the marketing department
 
Innovation and Trends:
 
• Stay abreast of industry trends and innovative marketing techniques
• Drive digital transformation in marketing strategies
 
Performance Monitoring:
 
• Track and analyse campaign performance and ROI
• Prepare and present performance reports to senior management
 
Related Years of Experience & Qualifications
 
• Bachelor’s degree in marketing/ mass communication / online advertising
• Min of 8+ years of Marketing, preferably in an advertising agency or related sector
• Real Estate Sector / Advertising / Communications / Brand Marketing
• Strong project management and organizational skills
• Excellent communication and presentation abilities
• Proficiency in marketing analytics and digital marketing tools
• Ability to work effectively in a matrix organization and manage multiple priorities
• Demonstrable ability to multi-task and adhere to deadlines
• Well-organized with a customer-oriented approach
 
 
Please note that this role is for UAE Nationals only.

source_jobs.title: Assistant Vice President - Events and Experience
source_jobs.description:
JOB PURPOSE 

  • Develop and lead the strategic events and experiences plan for Aldar Development, ensuring alignment with business objectives, project launches, sales priorities, and brand positioning.  

  • Drive the planning, governance, and execution of high-impact events, activations, and customer experiences that strengthen brand equity, generate commercial value, and enhance customer engagement.  

  • Leverage integrated marketing strategies and event platforms to support business growth, reinforce brand messaging, and deliver measurable business outcomes.  

 

ROLES AND RESPONSIBILITIES 

  • Develop short and long-term event strategies and annual event calendars aligned with Aldar Development's business objectives, project launches, and customer engagement plans.  

  • Lead the planning, development, and execution of

source_jobs.title: Assistant Vice President - Legal Counsel (UAE National)
source_jobs.description:
Job Purpose
 
Act as legal counsel on construction and development projects, providing legal advice on procurement strategies and the drafting, review and negotiation of construction-related agreements. The role is responsible for managing contractual and legal risk across the project lifecycle and supporting project teams on claims, variations and dispute resolution to safeguard Aldar’s commercial and legal interests.
 
Roles and Responsibilities
 

  • Lead the drafting, review, and negotiation of construction and project-related agreements, including main contracts, consultancy agreements, and related project documentation.
  • Advise on procurement strategies and contract structuring to ensure appropriate risk allocation and alignment with project objectives.
  • Provide legal support throughout the project lifecycle, from tender stage through project delivery to close-out.
  • Advise project teams on contract interpretation, administration, and compliance with contractual obligations.
  • Support the management of variations, claims, and extension of time matters, ensuring legal and commercial risks are mitigated.
  • Provide strategic advice on dispute avoidance and resolution, including managing pre-dispute processes, negotiations, and formal dispute proceedings (arbitration/litigation).
  • Liaise with and manage external legal counsel where required, including oversight of advice, budgets, and deliverables.
  • Collaborate with internal stakeholders including project, commercial, procurement, and finance teams to ensure consistent and practical legal support.
  • Develop and maintain standard form construction contracts, templates, and playbooks in line with market practice and Aldar requirements.
  • Ensure compliance with applicable laws, regulations, and internal governance policies in all construction-related matters.
  • Support risk management initiatives by identifying legal risks and proposing mitigation strategies across projects.
  • Contribute to internal knowledge sharing and continuous improvement of legal processes related to construction and project delivery.
 

RELATED YEARS OF EXPERIENCE

Min of 8+ years of experience in legal practice ideally in construction/real estate (private practice or in-house)

 

FIELD OF EXPERIENCE

Construction, Infrastructure, Project Procurement

 

TECHNICAL AND INTERPERSONAL SKILLS

  • Attention to detail
  • Systematic organizing capability
  • Ability to deal with senior executives
  • Time management
  • Negotiating skills
  • Excellent communication and relationship management skills
  • English language drafting mandatory - contracts and correspondence with counterparties and government entities
  • Arabic language capabilities would be beneficial

 

QUALIFICATION

  • Bachelors degree / Law degree
  • Legal qualifications (as applicable in country of qualification)

source_jobs.title: Assistant Vice President - Loyalty Marketing (UAE Nationals)
source_jobs.description:
Job Purpose
 
Develop and deliver loyalty marketing strategies across assigned priority verticals (e.g., Retail, Hospitality, Real Estate, or Education), driving measurable growth in revenue, profit, and market share within those focus areas. Develop short- and long-term loyalty campaigns and lifecycle promotions framework. Lead marketing campaign strategy, drive database growth and sales penetration across the group. Drive and maximize incremental revenue through campaigns for loyalty program. 
 
Roles and Responsibilities
 
Strategic Responsibilities
Own marketing strategy and execution for selected priority verticals, ensuring deep vertical alignment, strong stakeholder engagement, and delivery of measurable commercial outcomes.
Own the loyalty marketing P&L for selected verticals, overseeing budget planning, allocation, and financial forecasting.
Evaluate and prioritize marketing initiatives based on ROI, business impact, and strategic objectives alignment.
Develop and deliver multi-channel integrated loyalty campaigns in collaboration with key stakeholders, ensuring effective and efficient execution of the marketing plan, while also supporting ad-hoc campaign requests and planning as needed.
Conceptualize and execute strategic loyalty points offers in partnership with internal and external teams, leveraging data analytics and KPIs to optimize acquisition, activation, and retention.
Drive higher activation rates and incremental revenue by implementing and refining lifecycle marketing programs and enhancing BAU campaign targeting.
Partner closely with marketing leaders across assigned verticals, acting as the primary loyalty marketing lead for those areas while ensuring alignment with the broader loyalty program strategy.
Ensure the loyalty program brand is infused across all touch points of Aldar, Joint Ventures and Third-party partnerships.
 
Functional Responsibilities
 
Develop industry-leading personalized customer journeys to deepen the relationship with Darna members, including customer needs, messaging strategy, offer strategy, and engagement timing.
Drive, communications and product marketing, and new customer generation.
Responsible for customer-centric and data-driven strategies, including the planning, execution, and optimization of paid media, digital performance marketing, and owned and earned channels to drive acquisition, engagement, and conversion.
Lead paid media and digital marketing strategy across performance channels (e.g., search, social, display, programmatic, app marketing), ensuring strong ROI, optimized spend allocation, and continuous performance improvement.
Drive performance marketing capability including campaign targeting, attribution modelling, media optimization, and budget allocation across digital channels.
Create improvements for   all key customer metrics: cross sell, customer migration, lifetime value.
Align customer touchpoints with targeted communications tailored to defined segments and campaign objectives.
Prepare and manage annual budgets, ensuring efficient spend and profitability.
Ensure all marketing activities comply with legal, regulatory, and data privacy requirements.
Work closely with operations team to establish controls to ensure program integrity, fraud prevention, and fair usage of rewards.
 
RELATED YEARS OF EXPERIENCE
Min of 8+ years of relevant experience in loyalty, customer lifecycle, or strategic marketing. A track record in real estate and/or retail industries is highly preferred.
 
TECHNICAL AND INTERPERSONAL SKILLS
Strong expertise in paid media, digital performance marketing, and marketing technology platforms (e.g., Google Ads, Meta, programmatic platforms, CRM/CDP environments).
Proven experience managing digital media budgets and optimizing campaigns using data-driven methodologies.
Experience with marketing attribution models, audience segmentation, and digital funnel optimization.
Strong leadership skills with the ability to build relationships cross-fun

source_jobs.title: Assistant Vice President – Indirect Tax
source_jobs.description:
JOB PURPOSE
 
Manage the indirect tax function for Aldar Group.
 
Assist in the delivery of a full range of indirect tax services in compliance with laws and regulations.
 
ROLES AND RESPONSIBILITIES
 
Assist in developing and executing indirect tax strategies aligned with the group's objectives and regulatory requirements.
 
Participate in the preparation of indirect tax-related transactions and documentation.
 
Ensure adherence to accounting department policies and procedures, emphasizing compliance with UAE financial reporting statutes, standards, and best practices.
 
Contribute to the preparation of indirect tax returns and related filings.
 
Support the implementation of robust indirect tax compliance processes across the entities.
 
Assist in the periodic and annual indirect tax reporting to the authorities.
 
Provide M&A support and expertise from an indirect tax perspective.
 
Stay informed about changes to indirect tax legislation, providing input on their impact on the business.
 
Identify opportunities to optimize indirect tax positions and mitigate tax risks.
 
Assist in managing relationships and responses to indirect tax audits initiated by tax authorities.
 
Assist with the implementation of relevant indirect tax updates.
 
Provide training and guidance to the tax team and relevant stakeholders within Finance, Accounting, Internal Control, and other departments.
 
Participate in the review of intercompany and related party reconciliations, facilitating timely resolution of reconciling items.
 
Support and monitor audit processes for the assigned area, ensuring timely completion.
 
RELATED YEAR OF EXPERIENCE
Min of: 8+ years of experience of financial accounting and management accounting experience
 
FIELD OF EXPERIENCE
Experience of accounting within real estate or related industry is preferred
 
Preferably with in-house experience in a Big 4 firm.
 
Experience in VAT/E-Invoicing Implimentation
 
TECHNICAL AND INTERPERSONAL SKILLS
Understanding of UAE VAT laws, VAT registration and implementation
 
Knowledge of and ability to apply international accounting standards and ERP systems
 
Knowledge of and ability to adhere to internal controls
 
Good analytical skills
 
Vigilant and detail oriented
 
Strong communication skills
 
Strong time management capabilities
 
QUALIFICATION
Bachelors degree in accounting
 
Professional accounting qualification e.g. CPA or CTA  is preferred

source_jobs.title: Assistant Vice President – Talent Analytics
source_jobs.description:
JOB PURPOSE
To build and manage Aldar’s people data and analytics capability. This role enables data-driven decisions across all P&C teams by overseeing the full lifecycle of people data management, from collection and classification to cleansing and compliance (with data privacy regulations), and by translating data into workforce intelligence and predictive insights
 
ROLES AND RESPONSIBILITIES
 
People Data Management
Establish and oversee standards for people data collection, classification, and maintenance to ensure accuracy and integrity.
Partner with the VP People Digital Transformation to ensure system outputs provide clean and reliable data for analytics use.
Ensure compliance with data privacy regulations and ethical use of workforce data.
 
Analytics, Reporting & Dashboards
Design and manage P&C dashboards, workforce scorecards, and executive-level reporting for the CPCO and leadership team.
Deliver timely and accurate reporting on core HR metrics (e.g., headcount, turnover, diversity, absenteeism, engagement).
Continuously improve reporting tools and visualization methods to make data accessible and actionable for stakeholders.
Develop advanced analytics models (e.g., predictive attrition, workforce planning, pay equity, succession risk).
Interpret data trends and provide actionable insights to shape workforce strategy, employee experience, and organizational effectiveness.

Cross-Functional Partnership
Partner with the broader P&C team to measure impact of people initiatives (e.g., engagement, culture shifts, learning outcomes).
Collaborate with Group Technology and Group Finance to ensure workforce data aligns with broader enterprise reporting.
 
Experience
8+ years of experience in HR analytics, workforce planning, or business intelligence
Proven track record in data management, analytics, and visualization (e.g., Power BI, Tableau, Qlik, or equivalent).
Demonstrated ability to translate data into actionable business insights.
Experienced with large-scale HR data sets and integrating multiple data sources.
Familiarity with HR processes across the employee lifecycle.
Prior experience in private sector, large-scale organizations or fast-growth environments preferred.
 
Technical & Interpersonal Skills
Expertise in data analysis, visualization, and storytelling.
Strong understanding of HR metrics and workforce analytics best practices.
High proficiency in analytics tools (SQL, Python/R for HR analytics a plus).
Excellent problem-solving, critical thinking, and quantitative skills.
Ability to convey clear messages through data storytelling
Knowledge of data privacy requirements.

Qualifications
Bachelor’s degree in Data Science, Statistics, Business Analytics, HR, or related field (required).
Master’s degree (MSc in Analytics, HR Analytics, or MBA with quantitative focus) preferred.
Professional certifications in data/analytics (e.g., Power BI, Tableau, SQL, or People Analytics certifications) desirable.

source_jobs.title: Associate - Broker Management
source_jobs.description:
Job Purpose

To drive broker-led sales growth through strategic relationship management, market activation, and performance enablement. This role supports the expansion of Aldar’s broker network locally and internationally, ensuring broker partners are equipped, engaged, and delivering against defined revenue and registration KPIs

Roles & Responsibilities

- Act as a brand ambassador for Aldar and its project portfolio, ensuring      maximum visibility and broker buy-in across assigned markets

- Identify, onboard, and activate new broker agencies to support Aldar’s sales targets across UAE and global markets

-Execute structured broker enablement programs including project trainings,      workshops, and development briefings

-Support the delivery of broker sales events, exhibitions, and international      roadshows in coordination with leadership

-Collaborate with sales and marketing teams to align messaging, pricing, product priorities, and campaign strategies

-Manage day-to-day broker relationships, resolving escalations and flagging key risks to the leadership team

-Monitor and report on broker performance, registration trends, campaign impact, and lead quality using Salesforce and internal systems

-Provide insights into international markets, including competitive intelligence, regulatory dynamics, and sales penetration challenges

-Deliver awareness sessions to Aldar internal teams on broker performance, market opportunities, and channel strategies

-Recommend tactical promotions and broker incentives to overcome market-specific barriers and drive activation

-Ensure compliance with Aldar’s broker guidelines and support marketing governance across all broker-facing communications
 
Qualifications & Experience

RELATED YEARS OF EXPERIENCE
4+ years in real estate brokerage, developer relations, or channel sales (preferably with regional and international exposure)

FIELD OF EXPERIENCE
 Real estate / Developer

TECHNICAL AND INTERPERSONAL SKILLS
- In-depth knowledge of UAE real estate markets (Abu Dhabi & Dubai)
-Exposure to international real estate markets (UK, Egypt, China, Russia, India)
-Strong understanding of developer sales models and broker ecosystems   
-Excellent negotiation and relationship management skills 
-Strong analytical and reporting capabilities
-Confident public speaker with sharp presentation and communication skills
-Ability to work cross-functionally and manage high-pressure activations/events

QUALIFICATION
•        Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing or a related field

source_jobs.title: Associate - Customer Happiness
source_jobs.description:
JOB PURPOSE 
Support the Head of Customer Happiness to guide Customers from the beginning to the end of the villa completion and handover through face-to-face meetings at key check points
 
Please note, this role is for a UAE national only
 
ROLES AND RESPONSIBILITIES
Support the Head of Customer Happiness to:
Kick-off meetings with the Customer in TAMM Service Centers (in Abu Dhabi, Al Ain or Al Dhafra) or Customer Happiness centers
Prepare and capturing the Customer Requirements and ensuring they are stored in CRM
Ensuring that the Customer requirements are  captured accurately at the beginning and acts as point of contact with the Customer for any actions or notifications of milestones of their Project
Manage the relationships in a structured way through account planning and management through the entire design, construction and handover lifecycle
Develop a list of the Pre-qualified Vendors for the delivery of the villa Project
Ensure Customer service needs are meet at a high standard, by supporting the customer to understand the Designs, previewing the Show Village and the process for procuring a Design Consultant to deliver the design
Adherence to Customer Happiness policies and processes
Preparing and developing Lessons Learned reports and requesting feedback from customers via the online survey function
 
QUALIFICATION AND EXPERIENCE
RELATED YEAR OF EXPERIENCE:
Min of 4+ years of experience in a customer service or a related field
 
FIELD OF EXPERIENCE:
Retail estate sector, hospitality, banking sector, Client centric, Service sector.
 
TECHNICAL AND INTERPERSONAL SKILLS
Good understanding of Customer Relations and Services
Strong knowledge of CRM
Good understanding of the “Design and build” journey for residential Project
Proven strategic thinker with track record of innovation
Good conflict resolution/management skills
Good communication and interpersonal skills
 
QUALIFICATION 
Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Finance or any related field

source_jobs.title: Associate - Legal
source_jobs.description:
JOB PURPOSE 
Please note, this role is for a UAE national only

ROLES AND RESPONSIBILITIES
• Draft and proofread correspondence and legal documents.
• Research regulations, laws, and legal articles to assist with the preparation of reports, case files, and legal advice.
• Translate Arabic/English legal documents.
• Draft Court letters.
• Ensure POA’s are notarized and in line with legal compliance requests
• Assist senior team members with other workstreams as required such as contract reviews.
• Maintain current knowledge of relevant legal updates.

source_jobs.title: Associate - Property Management and Leasing (UAE Nationals)
source_jobs.description:
Job Purpose

Support the VP – Property Management, I&L and the Head of I&L in driving the operational, financial, and tenant performance of Aldar’s I&L portfolio.

Lead the execution of property management activities across assigned assets, ensuring efficient day-to-day operations, high service delivery standards, and alignment with asset management objectives across logistics parks, BTS assets, and multi-tenant developments.

 

Roles and Responsibilities

Property Operations Management

  • Support the VP – Property Management, I&L and Head of I&L in implementing Aldar’s I&L property management framework
  • Oversee day-to-day operations of assigned assets, ensuring alignment with asset management strategies and KPIs
  • Manage FM contractors, vendors, and AMC service providers, ensuring delivery against SLAs, contractual obligations, safety standards, and compliance requirements
  • Oversee vendor performance, contract compliance, and service quality, driving accountability and continuous improvement
  • Ensure compliance with health, safety, environmental, and regulatory standards
  • Drive continuous operational improvements across assets

 

Tenant Relations & Lease Administration

  • Manage tenant relationships to support satisfaction, retention, and lease renewals
  • Oversee lease administration processes including billing, collections, renewals, and documentation
  • Ensure timely resolution of tenant issues, coordinating with vendors and service providers where required
  • Coordinate with Asset Management, Leasing, and Finance teams on tenant performance and occupancy strategies

 

Financial Performance & Budgeting

  • Support OPEX and CAPEX budgeting in coordination with I&L leadership
  • Monitor vendor and AMC-related costs, identifying efficiency and cost optimization opportunities
  • Track key metrics including arrears, service charge recovery, and operational performance indicators
  • Support financial reporting and forecasting
 

Policies, Systems & Digitalization

  • Implement standardized policies and procedures aligned with I&L leadership direction
  • Support rollout and adoption of CAFM and digital systems
  • Monitor KPIs, SLAs, vendor performance metrics, and reporting dashboards
  • Ensure accuracy and integrity of operational data
 

Team Leadership & Stakeholder Management

  • Provide day-to-day directions, performance management, and support to the property management team
  • Collaborating with Asset Management, Development, Finance, and Legal teams
  • Act as a key interface for vendors, AMC providers, tenants, and service partners
  • Support alignment between internal teams and external service providers

 

Authority Liaison & Regulatory Approvals

  • Liaise with relevant government authorities and master developers across the Emirates to obtain required approvals and NOCs for property operations and projects
  • Coordinate submissions, documentation, and follow-ups related to permits, inspections, and regulatory compliance
  • Ensure all assets and operational activities remain compliant with local authority regulations and approval requirements
  • Support project teams in securing authority approvals during asset upgrades, fit-outs, and operational changes
 

Related Years of Experience

source_jobs.title: Associate – Corporate Tax
source_jobs.description:
JOB PURPOSE
 
Play a key role in implementing corporate tax strategies, projects, and ensuring tax compliance within the corporate tax function of Aldar Group.
 
Provide M&A support and expertise from a corporate tax perspective.
 
 
The role is only for a UAE National. 
 
 
ROLES AND RESPONSIBILITIES
 
Collaborate with the AVP – Corporate Tax and wider tax team to execute comprehensive Corporate tax strategies aligned with the group's objectives and regulatory requirements.
 
Assist in the review of the monthly tax provision calculation produced by the system, reconciling it to the ledger.
 
Participate in the end-to-end annual Corporate tax compliance process, ensuring the accurate and timely filing of all tax returns.
 
Conduct detailed reviews of deferred tax calculations for the group, ensuring compliance with accounting standards and regulations.
 
Lead transfer pricing initiatives, ensuring compliance with international guidelines and recommending strategies to optimize the company's global tax position.
 
Provide tax expertise during mergers, acquisitions, and corporate transactions, including due diligence, structuring, and post-transaction integration.
 
Assist in Country-by-Country Reporting (CBCR), Pillar 2 and Transfer Pricing (TP) initiatives in Direct / Corporate Tax.
 
Support Economic Substance Regulations (ESR) compliance.
 
Offer guidance on cross-border tax matters, including international tax planning, treaty analysis, and preparation of transfer pricing documentation.
 
Stay updated on changes in domestic and international tax laws and regulations, ensuring the organization's tax practices remain compliant and current.
 
Prepare and review tax-related financial reports and disclosures, including tax provision calculations.
 
Collaborate with cross-functional teams, external advisors, and tax authorities to address tax-related inquiries, audits, and projects efficiently.
 
 
RELATED YEARS OF EXPERIENCE
 
Min of: 2+ years of experience of experience in Accounting, mergers and acquisitions, and/or consultancy. 
 
 
FIELD OF EXPERIENCE
 
Experience in real estate industry
 
knowledge of accounting standards, tax laws and regulations.
 
 
TECHNICAL AND INTERPERSONAL SKILLS
 
Exceptional analytical and problem-solving abilities.
 
Strong interpersonal and communication skills.
 
Effective team player with the capacity to manage multiple projects concurrently.
 
 
QUALIFICATION
 
Bachelor’s degree in Accounting or Finance.

source_jobs.title: Associate Director - Investment Management & Deal structuring
source_jobs.description:
JOB PURPOSE
Partnerships & Investments (P&I) is responsible for driving growth & diversification of Aldar Development (AD) –expanding to new markets including platform acquisitions in Egypt (SODIC) / UK (London Square) and programmatic JVs in UAE (including Dubai Holding, Mubadala and other prominent private and governmental entities)
 
Role covers transaction origination and execution through to ongoing management of investments post transaction
 
Key focus on financial structuring, due diligence, capital raising, relationship management and driving investment returns
 
Preference for experience in real estate sector generally, Middle East markets
 
 
ROLES AND RESPONSIBILITIES
Business Planning, Strategy & Origination
Work with wider P&I team on strategy & business planning incl. evaluating new investment opportunities, obtaining internal buy-in and progressing IC approvals
 
Identify optimal investment structures for P&I investments including acquisitions, JVs and fund structures
Transaction Execution
Collaborate with internal stakeholders and external advisors on transaction management including leading financial due diligence & investment analysis and deal structuring
 
Lead execution of M&A acquisitions from termsheet to full documentation, liaising closely with wider P&I and AD to ensure that acquisitions align with objectives and risk adjusted return expectations
 
Lead new initiatives for project level capital raising and lead investments into new sectors
Ongoing Management of Partnerships & Investments post-transaction
Lead role in managing investments post-transaction including monitoring and optimizing investment performance and Aldar returns and supporting relationship management with partners (including SODIC, LSQ)
 
Maintain financial models and interface with wider AD team on project financials incl. overlays on Aldar returns
 
Value Accretion / capital raising – eg corporate capital increase, attracting new co-investors, future partial exit / dilution of Aldar stake, new expansion initiatives, bolt-on M&A, fund structures
 
Interface / coordinate with Group functions on portfolio level debt & equity funding and tax considerations for LSQ, SODIC etc
 
Work with wider team to review business plans, peer review of new opportunities and financial models
 
Serve as a member of JVCo boards and steering committees
 
Drive new initiatives for project level capital raising – via JVs / fund structures in conjunction with internal stakeholders
 
 
RELATED EXPERIENCE
Minimum 14 years experience executing and managing relevant M&A transactions
 
Minimum 6 years of managerial experience
 
Strong preference for experience in real estate sector / relevant markets
 
Extensive technical experience in accounting, financial modelling and structuring, financial due diligence and investment analysis for related transactions
 
Blend of professional advisory (Investment Bank / Big 4) and investment experience
 
Network of relevant investor relationships (SWFs / institutional / private investors in region and internationally)
 
TECHNICAL AND INTERPERSONAL SKILLS
Excellent numerical and analytical capabilities with acute attention to detail
 
Excellent verbal and written communication skills and negotiation skills
 
Strong interpersonal and relationship skills to build long-term trusted relationships
 
Proactive, motivated  and adaptable to take responsibility for seeing tasks through to completion
 
Ability to coach, nurture, develop and retain key talent and get stuck in / roll up sleeves
 
Strategic thinking and ability to drive results in a complex, fast-paced environment
 
Highly ethical and collaborative team player - strong work ethic blended with sense of fun and enthusiasm to actively participate in a lively team dynamic
 
QUALIFICATION
Relevant Degree in Finance; preference for CFA

source_jobs.title: Associate Director - Project Management
source_jobs.description:
JOB PURPOSE 
 
Manage the delivery of local and international projects in time, budget and quality 
Manage and ensure efficient project delivery and execution as per Development Management guidelines and Aldar standards, including the coordination of external stakeholders and providers attending in the project
 
ROLES AND RESPONSIBILITIES
 
·       Work closely with internal stakeholders to develop project timelines
·       Collect input from Scheduling and quality and recommend realistic project plan and timeline
·       Recommend design standards that ensure cost effectiveness and innovation in conjunction with Development Management
·       Obtain approval from the related development and design head
·       Coordinate with Development Management on defining the detailed project schedule and cost
·       Work closely with Procurement to develop initial project cost estimates
·       Challenge assumptions, raise flags and provide expertise to ensure realistic estimates
·       Partner with development and design department to assess impact of any changes in design or plans on construction
·       Support in developing mitigation and corrective actions once construction is underway
·       Inform procurement on any changes in contractor’s  scope of work, support procurement in negotiation of updated contract with contractors
·       Monitor progress of project works, and develop a risk mitigation plan in case any issues arise 
·       Provide input on contractor and sub-contractor selection and scope-of work drafting based on inputs from Tendering
·       Assess vendor performance, and draft a performance scorecard for all 3rd party service providers
·       Manage consultant resources to ensure appropriate and optimal deployment
·       Ensure contractors deliver services within scope of work (cost, quality, time)
·       Provide contractors with detailed project schedules so that they are aware of critical milestones
·       Maintain and update all project related documents, especially ones that are filled on-site
·       Support in final handover to Asset Management department with all documents
·       Responsible for safety and environmental compliance at project sites
·       Provide input to Infrastructure and Government Relations department to obtain licenses and permits for construction, and anticipate any delays that might be caused 
·       Assist Audit and Accounting departments in audits and project accounting activities
·       Provide input for setting up cross-functions SLAs, ensure compliance of the function with SLAs
·       Contribute to the generation of lessons learned on all projects to prevent reoccurrence of the same risks on future projects
·       Manage project portfolio within approved budget, schedule and quality in accordance with development guidelines and consistent with ALDAR/Government goals.
·       Coordinate closely with internal and external stakeholders on all issues related to additional requests and modifications from the start of construction to the hand-over of developments to end users
·       Manage all project activities related to infrastructure and ensure compliance with ALDAR requirements and authorities’ standards
·       Monitor all project schedules and cash flows for adherence to original schedule and budget and ensure progress is accurately reported to management
·       Identify deviations from plan and initiate mitigation actions to compensate for deviations in close alignment with Development Management
·       Establish and improve network with Government entities for smooth processing of licenses and permits
·       Manage project progress revenue (VOWD) in accordance with targets to achieve overall KPIs
 
QUALIFICATION AND EXPERIENCE
 
RELATED YEARS OF EXPERIENCE
Min of 14+ years of experience in project management oversight in a real estate company with annual revenue of at least AED 2 billion.
 
YOE IN MANAGERIAL POSITION
Min of 6+ years in a related managerial pos

source_jobs.title: Sales Manager (Abu Dhabi)
source_jobs.description:
JOB PURPOSE:

• Responsible for selling properties to Aldar new and existing customers, focusing on matching costumer needs with available inventory and launches. This role primarily emphasizes day-to-day interactions with potential buyers, generating leads, and facilitating transactions.

ROLES AND RESPONSIBILITIES:

• Generate leads through networking, marketing campaigns, and broker databases.
• Showcase available properties to potential buyers and highlight key features.
•Source and connect with potential buyers (both by Direct sources or indirect)
– Conduct site visits and prepare presentations
– Issue sales offers to potential buyers
• Own quarterly sales targets as per the annual overall sales target
• Prepare and manage contracts, payment plans, and other documentation related to the sales process.
• Ensure all sales adhere to regulatory guidelines and company policies.
• Develop client database and update CRM.
• Build and maintain strong relationships with HNWIs, corporate clients, and brokers.
• Provide a consultative sales approach, advising clients on the benefits of the development and its investment potential.
• Act as a trusted advisor to clients, assisting them with financing options, market trends, and legal processes.
• Manage the lead process and ensure all opportunities are up-to-date.
• Address any client concerns during or after the transaction and ensure to support customers requirements 
• Provide property visits and show home management, and respond to inquiries about pricing, amenities, and payment terms.

RELATED YEARS OF EXPERIENCE
Min of 4-6+ years in residential real estate sales with a track record of sales of 100million AED per annum.

Working Conditions
• Work Location: Indoor Office/Sales Centers and or Exhibition Spaces
• 6-day workweek

FIELD OF EXPERIENCE
•Solid track record and experience in tenant/customer relationship management. 
•Significant exposure to GCC and UAE real estate market.

TECHNICAL AND INTERPERSONAL SKILLS
•Demonstrated skills in building and maintaining strong relationships with internal and external stakeholders
•Excellent negotiation and persuasion skills
•Excellent conflict resolution/management skills
•Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
•Business-level+ command of Arabic and English, written and verbal.

QUALIFICATION
•Diploma degree in business administration/management, or equivalent is required. Bachelor Degree is an added value.
