source_jobs.title: Senior Associate - Development Projects Scheduling
source_jobs.description:
Job Purpose

•Monitor all project plans adherence to their initial schedule
•Ensure that schedule progress is accurately reported to management
•Identify risks and delays with mitigation plans

Please note, this role is for Emiratization Only.

Roles & Responsibilities

•Develop Aldar projects high-level pre-construction and construction planning in conjunction with the project teams, to identify critical path and alternate schedules
•Review plan against schedule developed by PMC/ EOR to ensure realistic timeframes and recommend changes
•Provide support and input during project feasibility phases
•Provide information to contracts team, on claims related issues
•Coordinate with project teams from pre-planning to delivery regarding scheduling, monitoring and risk mitigation
•Coordinate with project teams to track progress on project plan and adherence to schedule
•Support in development of reporting templates and prepare regular reports to assess Aldar projects portfolio adherence to schedule
•Identify and raise deviations from the plan to the senior manager, assess impact on project and liaise with project teams to notify them of potential delays
•Support project teams in identifying opportunities for improvement, risks and areas where additional effort is required 
•Coordinate with Cost Control to assess schedule deviations impact on the budget
•Review all variation orders and assess impact on overall project plan 
•Provide the criteria to distribute the forecast cost, according to the schedule, to develop the project cashflow.
•Generate regular reports on project progress to the management incl. risks and mitigations.

Key Results Areas
•Accuracy of project schedule and completion forecasted dates.
•Risk identification (% of risks/issues/failures identified in advance)

RELATED YEARS OF EXPERIENCE
Min of 5+ years of experience in planning and control of real estate development projects [annual revenue of at least AED 2 billion]

FIELD OF EXPERIENCE
•Real Estate / Construction

TECHNICAL AND INTERPERSONAL SKILLS
•Strong knowledge and exposure to the GCC real estate market
•Deep understanding of project phases
•Experience of using Primavera P6 is essential
•Ability to multi-task, monitor schedule for more than 5 projects at a time
•Adept at handling multiple stakeholder relationships 
•Excellent conflict resolution skills required to identify and propose solutions for any schedule slippage/cost overrun issues 
•Attention to detail to monitor and track schedule

QUALIFICATION
Bachelors degree in engineering, construction management or operations.

source_jobs.title: Senior Associate - IT Internal Audit
source_jobs.description:
JOB PURPOSE 
• Assist in executing the annual IT Audit Plan under the supervision of the line manager
• Assist in risk assessment, executing end to end IT Audit, and special assignments
 
Please note, this role is for a UAE national only

ROLES AND RESPONSIBILITIES

Internal Audit organization set-up:

• Ensure compliance to the approved Internal Audit (IA) processes, policies and procedures during the execution of audit engagements
• Support line manager in administrative tasks such as periodic updates to management, organizing department files, and meetings etc.

Monitoring and reporting:

• Draft the Risk Assessment and Control Matrix for performing the audit engagement to ensure engagement deliverables meet the audit scope and objectives
• Participate in creating, reviewing and finalizing the internal audit engagements and reports ensuring that all engagement terms of • reference have been adequately responded to and are adequately documented
• Assist the line manager in gathering the data for preparing presentations/ materials for submission to the head of Internal Audit/ higher management where applicable

Audit execution:
• Conduct initial research on the subject matter to be audited to identify potential risks and controls
• Assist with audit kickoff meetings to discuss the scope (process review) with the concerned department(s)
• Identify the key processes in conjunction with the department 
• Develop the process flow of the current process the “As Is” to identify technology risk points and validate available controls
• Perform control design testing documentation and operating effectiveness testing
• Draft detailed report and executive summary for Line Manager’s review and final discussion with the department
• Conduct a follow-up the following year of the engagement on assess the status of action plans and submit the follow-up report
 
 
QUALIFICATION AND EXPERIENCE

RELATED YEAR OF EXPERIENCE:
• 4-6 years of experience in IT Audit

FIELD OF EXPERIENCE:
• Big 4 Consulting or equivalent. Oracle and Salesforce audit experience is a plus

TECHNICAL AND INTERPERSONAL SKILLS
• Primary - Excellent in IT Audit procedures and analyzing internal control gaps for IT General Controls and Application Controls
• Secondary - Cybersecurity audit, Data analytics
• High proficiency in presentation and reporting skills is a must

QUALIFICATION
•   Bachelor’s degree in accounting, finance, engineering or Information Systems/ Technology
• Certified Information Systems Auditor (CISA) or Certified in Risk and Information Systems Control (CRISC) certification or equivalent

source_jobs.title: Senior Associate - Occupational Safety and Health
source_jobs.description:
JOB PURPOSE
•Support in the implementation of ALDAR OSH Management system in line to the requirements and legal obligations described by Abu Dhabi Occupational Safety & Health Centre ADOSH across all developments or project scope, particular jurisdiction legislation requirements and nature of work.
ROLES AND RESPONSIBILITIES
•Update ALDAR legal compliance register, risk register and related Occupational Safety and Health Management System “OSHMS” formats, elements and appendixes to meet (Abu Dhabi Occupational Safety and Health Centre & ISO 45001) ADOSH legal requirements, or any widespread Emirates Authority requirements and implement ALDAR OSH Management system. This including compliance to succeed ADOSH audits and dealing with authority and third parties to close out the pending issues.  
•Review the trend analysis of unsafe acts and unsafe condition and all incidents and decide whether the existing arrangements are adequate, or additional control measures are applicable. 
•Review and approve activities specific risk assessments along with approved method statement. This including producing safe working procedures and generate new risk assessment. 
•Participate in all OSH proactive monitoring programme e.g., management walk, office and site inspection, welfare facilities inspections compliance, site meeting, authority visit, internal and external audits, monitoring the OSH objectives and targets any OSH program or initiatives etc. and issue all required OSH reports.
•Organise and cover all OSH requirements related to management review meeting and necessary implementation of new legal and Project requirements.
•Conduct regular compliance audit on all involved parties to ensure effective implementation of ALDAR OSH management system and full compliance ALDAR OSHMS elements and related appendixes.
•Produce, review and approve OSH documents e.g., emergency evacuation and rescue plans, Lifting plans, OSH Alerts, OSH plan, OSH prequalification etc. this including participating in collecting and preparing any OSH report e.g. OSH sustainability data, OSH monthly dashboard, annual report etc.  
•Maintain and update the tracking register to the following records: Inspection and close out report, Audit and close out report, ALDAR OSH Management Walk and close out report, Serious OSH incident and non-serious OSH incident along with evidence of incident notification for authority, OSH Enforcement Notice and close out, Risk Register etc. 
•Follow up with PMC, Consultants and Principal contractor to close out outstanding issues and submit the monthly OSH Reports as per the approved calendar and review in line with ALDAR OSHMS requirements & gather all required OSH data for all reports prior to obtain an approval.   
•Review each project Monthly OSH Proactive monitoring Programme for full compliance with ALDAR OSHMS requirements and necessary implementation by PMC, Consultants and Principal contractor and obtain approval. 
•Attend periodic OSH meetings and committee meetings on each project to debate the site wide issues as per ALDAR OSHMS.
•Give effective support to cover all projects by Monitoring contractor compliance with OSH rules and guidelines and daily site visits.  
•Report all major non-compliance infractions to the line manager and project delivery team and set up appropriate action plan for close out. 
•Evaluate the performance of approved OSH representative and recommend where improvements are required or replacement.
•Plan for regular OSH campaigns across all ALDAR developments and engage authorities where required for participation.
•Tracking all new legal requirements, changes and advise all involved parties for full compliance    
•Follow up with authorities and other stakeholders regarding all OSH issues for full compliance this including ensuring the OSHMS is in line with ISO 45001 and ADOSH-SF and dealing with them in case of incident or site visit/audits e.g., ADOSH or widespread Emirates Authority requirements, Abu Dh

source_jobs.title: Senior Associate – Data Scientist
source_jobs.description:
JOB PURPOSE
 
As a Senior Associate – Data Scientist, you will design, build, and productionize advanced analytics and AI solutions that drive measurable business value. You will work closely with Data Product Owners, Data Analysts, BI Developers, and Data Quality Specialists to translate complex business challenges into data-driven models and experiments. Leveraging Python, SQL, and modern ML frameworks, you will develop scalable machine learning solutions that are explainable, governed, and aligned with organizational priorities.
 
ROLES AND RESPONSIBILITIES
 
Translate business problems into data science projects by defining clear hypotheses, success metrics, and validation methods.
 
Explore, clean, and transform structured and unstructured data using Python and SQL to prepare high-quality datasets for modeling.
 
Design, train, and evaluate machine learning models using appropriate algorithms and statistical techniques (e.g., regression, classification, clustering, NLP, forecasting).
 
Collaborate with engineering and platform teams to productionize AI models through reproducible pipelines and CI/CD workflows.
 
Apply model explainability, fairness, and interpretability techniques (e.g., SHAP, LIME, feature importance) to ensure transparency and accountability.
 
Support AI governance activities, including Model Risk Management (MRM) processes, ensuring compliance and responsible use of AI.
 
Conduct and analyze A/B tests or controlled experiments to assess model and feature performance.
 
Work with Data Product Owners to define business outcomes, monitor model performance post-deployment, and ensure continued relevance.
 
Collaborate with Data Quality Specialists to ensure input data meets quality, lineage, and governance standards.
 
Communicate results effectively through visualizations, storytelling, and presentations tailored to technical and non-technical audiences.
 
 
RELATED YEARS OF EXPERIENCE
 
5+ years of experience in data science, applied machine learning, or advanced analytics.
 
Proven experience delivering models that have been deployed and integrated into business processes or digital products.
 
Experience working in agile, cross-functional teams with Product Owners, Data Analysts, and Data Engineers.
 
 
TECHNICAL AND INTERPERSONAL SKILLS
 
Advanced proficiency in Python (pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn, XGBoost, LightGBM).
 
Strong command of SQL for data extraction, transformation, and validation.
 
Experience working in Databricks or equivalent data and ML platforms.
 
Familiarity with deep learning frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow) and ML lifecycle tools (MLflow, Airflow, Docker, Kubernetes).
 
Understanding of model explainability, ethics, fairness, and governance.
 
Knowledge of AI governance processes and documentation standards, including Model Risk Management (MRM).
 
Exposure to cloud platforms (Azure, Snowflake) and APIs for integrating AI models into applications.
 
Familiarity with version control (Git/GitHub) and collaborative coding practices.
 
Excellent communication skills to explain technical findings in clear business terms.
 
Collaborative and curious, with a passion for continuous learning and innovation

QUALIFICATION
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Engineering, or a related quantitative field.
 
Master’s degree or higher in Data Science, Machine Learning, or Applied Statistics is an advantage.

source_jobs.title: Senior Associate – Employee Experience (UAE Nationals)
source_jobs.description:
Job Purpose
 
Implement a unique employee journey across Aldar’s various touch-points and ensure group wide alignment to the end-to-end process, communication & tools. Conduct programs which transform the culture of Aldar group based on the corporate values. Monitor and evaluate change management initiatives regarding their impact.
 
Roles and Responsibilities
 
  • Capture and understand how the business works and what determines Aldar’s corporate values
  • Give input for the development of the cultural transformation strategy based on Aldar’s mission and vision
  • Support the design the framework and support the implementation of a unique employee journey including end-to-end processes
  • Align the employees' journey across the various Aldar subsidiaries to standardize practices, communication, and behaviour
  • Ensure the implementation of an integral Employee Journey process in conjunction with relative PCP functions
  • Propose, implement & monitor effective employee benefit programs, corporate and group-wide events, awards, discounts, liaising with other arms of the business and subsidiaries
  • Conduct awareness and training sessions with business heads and hiring managers to communicate the USPs of Aldar’s employee journey
  • Collaborate with the employee and monitor their behaviour, personal interest, and abilities to better revise new strategies
  • Conduct gap analysis and design and revise strategies accordingly & keep an eye on industry trends to ensure remaining competitive
 
Qualifications and Skillset
 
  • Min of 4+ years of experience in HR support service position within a leading regional organization.
  • Experience in HR Support services.
     
  • Developing and implementing a wide array of programs.
  • Bachelor’s degree in business administration or equivalent is required.

source_jobs.title: Senior Associate – Environmental
source_jobs.description:
Job Purpose :
To support the implementation, monitoring, and continual improvement of Aldar’s Environmental Management System (EMS) across all construction and development projects, ensuring compliance with UAE environmental legislation, Environment Agency Abu Dhabi (EAD) requirements, Estidama, and ISO 14001 standards while promoting environmental best practices and sustainability objectives.
Key Accountabilities
· Implement and maintain the Environmental Management System (EMS), including environmental policies, procedures, objectives, and targets.
· Ensure compliance with UAE environmental laws, EAD requirements, Estidama, and ISO 14001 standards across projects.
· Monitor PMCs, consultants, and contractors for compliance with EIAs, CEMPs, environmental permits, policies, and targets.
· Coordinate and follow up on obtaining environmental permits and NOCs from project initiation through handover.
· Conduct regular site inspections and internal/external environmental audits, including second-party audits.
· Ensure environmental monitoring (air, water, terrestrial), SDS compliance, and chemical content limits are in line with UAE legislation.
· Coordinate pollution control, waste management, recycling, emergency response, conservation, and renewable energy initiatives.
· Enhance environmental awareness and culture through initiatives, campaigns, and alerts.
· Ensure Estidama requirements are aligned and integrated with the EMS.
· Liaise with authorities, including Environment Agency Abu Dhabi (EAD), on environmental compliance matters.
· Support environmental investigations and report incidents or non-compliances as required.
· Collect environmental data and prepare monthly environmental performance reports and dashboards.
· Maintain environmental records and documentation on the Aldar QHSE platform.
· Participate in contractor and service provider prequalification and provide technical environmental advice.
· Contribute to environmental CSR initiatives where applicable.
Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)
· Environmental compliance performance across projects
· Number of environmental breaches (repeat vs. non-repeat)
· Timeliness of contractor approvals and EAD compliance
· HSE environmental spend vs. approved budget
Qualifications
· Bachelor’s Degree in Environmental Engineering, Engineering, or related discipline
· Environmental Diploma (preferred)
· ISO 14001 Lead Auditor certification
Experience
· Minimum 5+ years’ experience in Environmental Engineering
· Experience with large developers, construction firms, PMCs, consultants, contractors, or government entities
· UAE / GCC experience preferred
Skills & Competencies
· Strong knowledge of UAE and GCC environmental regulations
· Contractor environmental assessment and compliance monitoring
· Audit, inspection, and reporting expertise
· Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously
· Strong communication skills in English and Arabic
Job Purpose : To support the implementation, monitoring, and continual improvement of Aldar’s Environmental Management System (EMS) across all construction and development projects, ensuring compliance with UAE environmental legislation, Environment Agency Abu Dhabi (EAD) requirements, Estidama, and ISO 14001 standards while promoting environmental best practices and sustainability objectives.
Key Accountabilities
· Implement and maintain the Environmental Management System (EMS), including environmental policies, procedures, objectives, and targets.
· Ensure compliance with UAE environmental laws, EAD requirements, Estidama, and ISO 14001 standards across projects.
· Monitor PMCs, consultants, and contractors for compliance with EIAs, CEMPs, environmental permits, policies, and targets.
· Coordinate and follow up on obtaining environmental permits and NOCs from project initiation through handover.
· Conduct regular site inspections and internal/external environmental audits, including second-party audits.
· Ensure environmental monitoring (a

source_jobs.title: Senior Associate – Government Relations
source_jobs.description:
JOB PURPOSE
•Assist in establishing relationship with Government authorities to ensure that all necessary permits and licenses for the development’s projects are obtained in a timely manner.
•Assist the PM team to the successful delivery of a major Infrastructure, Housing and Development projects.
ROLES AND RESPONSIBILITIES
§Assist processing of all required project developments and construction permits through external government agencies, and follow-up on the reviews and comments of approving agencies.
§Ensure close coordination with project teams as required to secure permits from relevant external/internal entities such as Government Authorities across Abu Dhabi Emirate
§Coordinate with project teams as necessary to assure that all ongoing project development and construction projects are conducted in line with the licenses and permits obtained.
§Monitor related government laws and regulations affecting the development of the different projects and highlight any changes or amendments that might affect it
§Ensure that all required permits are obtained in a timely manner to prevent any delays in the project delivery schedule
•Assist the validation of prepared documents by the consultant and contractors for Assets handing over.
•Learn and maintain assets handing over tracker and plan for each project to ensure and maintain the implementation of assets handing over plan.
•Coordinate and under supervision, take a lead in communication/ negotiation with local authorities for assets handing over process till signing Assets handing over agreements.
•Report any potential that could affect the schedule of assets handing over ALDAR
•Develop technical understanding of infrastructure sub-disciplines (roads, wet utilities, dry utilities)
•Support  the collection, assimilation and communication of government in a timely and efficient manner; 
•Attend to all critical issues to ensure that services are delivered in the most effective manner
•Build strong stakeholder relations with the focal persons in the services provided to which will enable PM to avoid any delay related to authorities' approvals.
•Learn and process coordinate tracking, managing and storing documents relevant to assets handing over for each project
FIELD OF EXPERIENCE
•Strong knowledge of construction-related policies and permits application processes 
•Strong network of key Government entities representatives
TECHNICAL AND INTERPERSONAL SKILLS
•Excellent communication and inter-personal skills
•Excellent oral and written English and Arabic
•Excellent problem solving and decision-making skills
•Excellent planning and organization skills

KEY RESULT AREAS
•Timeliness of permits applications  
•Effectiveness in permit/NOC approvals 
•Development & Portfolio Management Satisfaction 
•Timeliness in generating Infrastructure designs
•Number of design defects recorded post-delivery
QUALIFICATION
Bachelor degree, preferably in public policy, government, public administration

source_jobs.title: Senior Vice President - DM Portfolio
source_jobs.description:
JOB PURPOSE
Development Management responsibilities for Real       Estate projects
Hands-on role in leading the creation of a new       program that will identify and deliver the sale of D-Hold assets from       Aldar Development to Aldar Investment.
Negotiate and lead the execution of key       commercial development agreements for real estate assets to be acquired       by Aldar Investment for recurring income; as well as other development       agreements executed with external stakeholders.
Active involvement in managing the investment       analysis, approvals (ICs / ExCo) and post-deal execution phase of D-Hold       developments and special situation projects.
 
ROLES AND RESPONSIBILITIES
Role:
Experience in leading multi-disciplinary teams       (including project teams and external consultants) in the delivery of       complex development projects.
Ability to maintain productive relationships       between various leaders, departments, and partners across the public and       private sectors, build trust by leveraging openness, diplomacy, and tact.
Lead development management interface between       Aldar Development, Aldar Investment and Aldar Group for all D-Hold       related activities as well as other development projects.
Formulate and manage the development strategy       for delivering the sale of real estate projects Aldar Investment and 3rd       parties.
Prepare, manage and negotiate key development       management agreements with regard to optimizing value for Aldar.
Act as a conduit between internal and external       stakeholders to establish a consistent engagement approach by       implementing best practices across the entire development lifecycle of       all projects.
What you will do:
Lead development management responsibilities for       real estate projects
Manage program governance processes and       structures working in close collaboration with stakeholders.
Negotiate and finalize transaction documents       including Terms of Reference, SPAs, Development Management Agreements,       Cooperative Agreements and other transaction documents that are conducive       to achieving Aldar Development’s goals.
Build influential and collaborative       relationships with all stakeholders and ensure that necessary approvals       are achieved in accordance with Aldar Development requirements.
Work with the wider development team and       internal stakeholders (Aldar Group, Aldar Investments and Aldar Projects)       on transaction management through the successful closure including due       diligence, investment analysis, developing SPAs and commercial input into       the documentation.
Lead role in managing the execution development       agreements with external stakeholders and partner relationships       post-transactions.
Provide support on an Ad-Hoc basis for special       projects to the Chief Development Officer and the wider Management       Executive team 
 
RELATED YEARS OF EXPERIENCE
Min. 12 years of experience 
FIELD OF EXPERIENCE
Strong existing knowledge of development       management agreements and key commercial agreements
Feasibility analysis including developing       cashflows and investment analysis for Business Plans
Knowledge and exposure of UAE / GCC real estate 
TECHNICAL AND INTERPERSONAL SKILLS
Development management skills
Excellent numerical and analytical capabilities       with acute attention to detail
Excellent verbal and written communication       skills
Strong interpersonal and relationship skills to       build long-term trusted relationships
Proactive, motivated and adaptable to change
Able to take responsibility for seeing tasks       through to completion 
Highly ethical and collaborative team player
Strong work ethic blended with sense of fun and       enthusiasm to actively participate in a lively team dynamic
QUALIFICATION
Bachelor Degree finance, economics or business administration

source_jobs.title: Senior Vice President - Legal Counsel
source_jobs.description:
Job Purpose

To lead the legal function's strategic contribution to Aldar's Development business by providing authoritative legal counsel on high-value, complex real estate and corporate transactions. The SVP acts as a trusted senior adviser to the General Counsel – Development and executive leadership, driving legal strategy, leading high-stakes negotiations and ensuring robust legal risk management across the Development portfolio. The role is equally accountable for elevating the capability of the wider legal team and embedding improved standards of transaction execution across the function.

Roles and Responsibilities

Strategic Transactions & Deal Execution

  • Lead legal structuring and execution of joint ventures, partnerships and strategic investments across Aldar's real estate portfolio, including hotels, schools, retail malls and office assets.
  • Drive negotiation of high-value, non-standard and complex strategic legal agreements, ensuring efficient execution and alignment with Aldar's commercial objectives.
  • Provide legal leadership on complex deal structures and transaction strategies, advising on optimal structuring to maximise value and manage exposure.
  • Ensure effective legal positioning in multi-party, cross-border and cross-functional transactions.
  • Support execution of strategic business growth initiatives, including large-scale acquisitions, divestments and group-level structuring projects.
  • Oversee documentation for leasing transactions across Aldar's diversified portfolio, including tenant management, renewals and enforcement.
  • Review, negotiate and lead on property management agreements, facilities management contracts, licences and service agreements.
  • Apply specialist knowledge of hotel and school management agreements and franchise agreements to advise on complex sector-specific transactions.

Legal Advisory & Risk Management

  • Provide authoritative, commercially oriented legal advice on high-complexity and business-critical matters across the Development business.
  • Lead identification and mitigation of legal risks in strategic matters, ensuring appropriate contractual protections and deal safeguards are embedded in all transactions.
  • Support business teams in structuring innovative and non-standard solutions, balancing risk management with commercial growth objectives.
  • Guide the business on legal compliance, applicable regulatory frameworks and internal governance requirements.
  • Oversee legal input into risk and commercial decision-making, including escalated and contentious matters.
  • Support development of legal standards and best-practice frameworks for complex transactions within the Development business.

 

Stakeholder Engagement & External Management

  • Engage directly with senior leadership and key stakeholders (including Commercial, Finance, Treasury, Tax and Strategy) coordinating legal inputs across transactions.
  • Lead interactions with strategic partners, investors and counterparties, representing Aldar's legal position in high-level negotiations.
  • Appoint and manage external law firms, provide clear legal instructions and manage associated spend within budget.

 

Team & Process

  • Allocate work across the team and mentor members on structuring, negotiation and deal execution, building internal expertise.
  • Propose and drive continuous improvement in transaction execution processes, legal templates and tools.
  • Maintain current knowledge of relevant legal developments in the UAE and key international jurisdictions applicable

source_jobs.title: Senior Vice President - Master Planning - Projects
source_jobs.description:
JOB PURPOSE
•Manage master planning activities from pre-concept through to detailed masterplan for all government and Aldar Development projects
ROLES AND RESPONSIBILITIES
•Review master plan and detailed master plan submittals by the internal team and consultants.
•Provide support review and advisory services on master planning matters to Project Management during construction stage.
•Manage the selection and work of master planning consultants; Ensure quality, budget and time compliance of the consultant’s work in accordance with the service contract. 
•Manage service contracts including preparing RFPs, and processing payments and variations.
•Evaluate and select proposals of master planning consultants with focus on quality insurance, budget and time compliance of the consultant’s work in accordance with the service contract and Aldar standards, e.g. Estimada and UPC AD 2030 vision
•Ensure key procurement contract variations arising from differences in project design raising major issues to related policies are addressed.
•Manage the master planning approval requirements with external stakeholders and government entities during design phases for government projects
•Ensure provision of constant progress updates and monthly written reports on construction progress, major issues or conflicts and anticipated roadblocks whenever appropriate
•Periodically update any change to the master plan design, timeline and cost to Development Management and other Operations teams such as by issuing Monthly Progress Reports (MPR). Assess impact on all delivery activities and minimize financial and operational impact.
•Identify deviations to original master planning and adopt the master plan design, timeline and/or cost accordingly together with Development Management
•Provide regular reporting on construction progress including issues and mitigation strategies
•Ensure the issuance of all required government permits and construction licenses.
•Ensure possible value engineering ideas are identified to cut costs/time and provide recommendations to project teams.
FIELD OF EXPERIENCE
Real estate developer (GCC).
TECHNICAL AND INTERPERSONAL SKILLS
•Deep exposure to GCC region and adjacent markets preferred
•Excellent design & masterplanning capabilities
•Excellent leadership skills and ability to delegate and coordinate responsibilities
•Strong conflict resolution/management skills
•Strong team player with ability to balance conflicting priorities and take timely decisions
•Excellent analytical skills
•Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal, required to present master plans to senior leaders for approval.
•Experienced in working with and leading multi-disciplinary teams that include members from Business Planning, Master Planning, Design, Project Management, Procurement and Commercial functions.
QUALIFICATION
Bachelor degree in engineering, architecture or equivalent is required
Technical post-graduate degree is preferred

source_jobs.title: Senior Vice President -DM Retail
source_jobs.description:
JOB PURPOSE
Development Management responsibilities for Real       Estate projects
Hands-on role in leading the creation of a new       program that will identify and deliver the sale of D-Hold assets from       Aldar Development to Aldar Investment.
Negotiate and lead the execution of key       commercial development agreements for real estate assets to be acquired       by Aldar Investment for recurring income; as well as other development       agreements executed with external stakeholders.
Active involvement in managing the investment       analysis, approvals (ICs / ExCo) and post-deal execution phase of D-Hold       developments and special situation projects.
 
ROLES AND RESPONSIBILITIES
Role:
Experience in leading multi-disciplinary teams       (including project teams and external consultants) in the delivery of       complex development projects.
Ability to maintain productive relationships       between various leaders, departments, and partners across the public and       private sectors, build trust by leveraging openness, diplomacy, and tact.
Lead development management interface between       Aldar Development, Aldar Investment and Aldar Group for all D-Hold       related activities as well as other development projects.
Formulate and manage the development strategy       for delivering the sale of real estate projects Aldar Investment and 3rd       parties.
Prepare, manage and negotiate key development       management agreements with regard to optimizing value for Aldar.
Act as a conduit between internal and external       stakeholders to establish a consistent engagement approach by       implementing best practices across the entire development lifecycle of       all projects.
What you will do:
Lead development management responsibilities for       real estate projects
Manage program governance processes and       structures working in close collaboration with stakeholders.
Negotiate and finalize transaction documents       including Terms of Reference, SPAs, Development Management Agreements,       Cooperative Agreements and other transaction documents that are conducive       to achieving Aldar Development’s goals.
Build influential and collaborative       relationships with all stakeholders and ensure that necessary approvals       are achieved in accordance with Aldar Development requirements.
Work with the wider development team and       internal stakeholders (Aldar Group, Aldar Investments and Aldar Projects)       on transaction management through the successful closure including due       diligence, investment analysis, developing SPAs and commercial input into       the documentation.
Lead role in managing the execution development       agreements with external stakeholders and partner relationships       post-transactions.
Provide support on an Ad-Hoc basis for special       projects to the Chief Development Officer and the wider Management       Executive team 
 
RELATED YEARS OF EXPERIENCE
Min. 12 years of experience 
FIELD OF EXPERIENCE
Strong existing knowledge of development       management agreements and key commercial agreements
Feasibility analysis including developing       cashflows and investment analysis for Business Plans
Knowledge and exposure of UAE / GCC real estate 
TECHNICAL AND INTERPERSONAL SKILLS
Development management skills
Excellent numerical and analytical capabilities       with acute attention to detail
Excellent verbal and written communication       skills
Strong interpersonal and relationship skills to       build long-term trusted relationships
Proactive, motivated and adaptable to change
Able to take responsibility for seeing tasks       through to completion 
Highly ethical and collaborative team player
Strong work ethic blended with sense of fun and       enthusiasm to actively participate in a lively team dynamic
QUALIFICATION
Bachelor Degree finance, economics or business administration

source_jobs.title: Senior Vice President – Commercial Strategy and Analysis
source_jobs.description:
Job Purpose:
 
•Lead the development and execution of Aldar Development’s Commercial strategy, ensuring full alignment with the company’s broader objectives and long-term goals.
•Establish a data-driven culture within Commercial, spearheading analytics and BI to inform decision-making, performance monitoring, and strategic planning.
•Serve as the key strategic partner to the Chief Commercial Officer, translating market intelligence and performance data into actionable business strategies.
 
Job Responsibilities:
 

Strategy Development & Execution

•Develop and lead Aldar Development’s overall Commercial strategy, integrating inputs across Sales, CX, Marketing, and Operations.
•Cascade the Commercial strategy to all business units, ensuring alignment and assisting in developing departmental scorecards and strategic initiatives.
•Lead strategic planning processes including market assessments, financial modelling, and competitive analysis.
•Drive digital transformation and innovation initiatives within the Commercial function.
•Act as primary contact for senior leadership on commercial strategy, performance, and operational improvements.

Data Analysis & Performance Monitoring

•Establish and maintain a robust data analytics and business intelligence capability across Commercial.
•Oversee commercial forecasting, providing accurate revenue projections, budgets, and scenario planning.
•Ensure availability, accuracy, and timeliness of data, dashboards, and performance reports for commercial leadership.
•Monitor market trends, competitive dynamics, and macroeconomic conditions to identify opportunities and risks.
•Champion the use of BI tools (Tableau, Power BI, CRM analytics) across the function.

Reporting & Stakeholder Management

•Prepare and present regular commercial performance reports and strategic insights to the CCO and senior leadership.
•Track key financial and non-financial KPIs including revenue performance, NPS, and sales efficiency.
•Ensure Commercial activities operate within budget while maximizing ROI.
•Partner with Group Strategy on consolidated reporting, target-setting, and manpower planning.
 
Years of Experience:
 
•Min 12+ years of strategy and analytics experience in a large multinational company, real estate firm, or top-tier management consultancy. Deep expertise in strategy deployment frameworks and GCC real estate market dynamics.

YoE in Managerial Position

•Min 4+ years of managerial experience leading strategy and analytics teams.

Field of Experience

•Management Consulting / Real Estate / Strategy. Strong GCC market knowledge essential.

Technical and Interpersonal Skills

•Expertise in strategy development and balanced scorecard frameworks.
•Advanced data analytics and BI skills (Tableau, Power BI, SQL, CRM platforms).
•Strong financial modelling and commercial forecasting capabilities.
•Excellent communication and executive presentation skills.
•Ability to manage multiple strategic workstreams in a fast-paced environment.

Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in Business, Economics, or a related field. Master’s degree / MBA strongly preferred

notes: Aldar is a large real estate development company with a diverse range of job postings, including many non-tech roles. While there are some tech-related positions, they are not the primary focus of the company.
